name: Shenzhen Jufei Optoelectronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Jufei Optoelectronics Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of SMD LED devices in China, South Korea, Japan, India, Turkey, and internationally. The company offers backlight LED devices, lighting LED, display, automotive, and flash LED devices, as well as backlight LED modules, optical film, and TO-CAN products. Its products are used in various applications, such as mobile communications, liquid crystal display, lighting, automotive electronics and lighting, screen displays, Nixie tube, and other electrical appliances. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
